name: /audit-pack: bundles the AIBOM section sourced from compliance/AIBOM-<tag>.json
command: mkdir -p compliance && printf '{"bomFormat":"CycloneDX","specVersion":"1.6","components":[{"name":"claude-sonnet-4-6","type":"machine-learning-model"}]}' > compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --aibom-file "$PWD/compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section aibom && grep -E "AIBOM|CycloneDX" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
